ip_risk_notes: Sudoku is a generic puzzle format. Avoid 'Will Shortz', 'Penny Press', 'KAPPA', 'New York Times' style branding.

unique_hook.angle: True step-by-step solution walkthroughs (technique annotations: naked single, hidden pair, X-wing) — most top-10 just dump answer keys

evergreen_baseline.evidence: Sudoku-as-tutorial demand growing as new solvers enter

repeat_buyer.audience: Learners → graduate up the difficulty ladder

leading_indicators.google_trends: Sudoku evergreen (5y stable baseline, no major decline)
leading_indicators.etsy: Printable sudoku market exists but small relative to Amazon
